differences.title: 1. RENDERING STRATEGY
differences.leftDesc: Strong emphasis on Static Site Generation and Server-Side Rendering.
differences.rightDesc: Primarily Server-Side Rendering, with client-side hydration.

differences.title: 2. DATA FETCHING
differences.leftDesc: Fetch data at build time or request time.

differences.title: 3. ROUTING
differences.leftDesc: Pages and API routes defined by file structure.
differences.rightDesc: Routes and layouts defined by file structure.

differences.title: 4. FORM HANDLING
differences.leftDesc: Handle form submissions via dedicated API routes.
differences.rightDesc: Built-in form submission and mutation handling.

differences.title: 5. NESTED LAYOUTS
differences.leftDesc: Supports creating complex nested UI structures easily.
differences.rightDesc: Built-in support for nested routing and layouts.

differences.title: 6. CODE SPLITTING
differences.leftDesc: Automatically splits code for faster initial load times.

differences.title: 7. ECOSYSTEM
differences.leftDesc: Leverages the vast Next.js and React ecosystems.
differences.rightDesc: Focuses on web standards and React.
